item.description: The U.S. launched what it called “self-defense strikes” after an American helicopter was shot down by an Iranian drone over the Strait of Hormuz, as President Trump vowed Iran would “pay the price.” NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

media:content.media:title: U.S. launches ‘self defense’ strikes on Iran after Apache helicopter shot down
media:content.media:description: The U.S. launched what it called “self-defense strikes” after an American helicopter was shot down by an Iranian drone over the Strait of Hormuz, as President Trump vowed Iran would “pay the price.” NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

item.title: U.S. launches ‘self defense’ strikes on Iran after Apache helicopter shot down

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
item.description: The New York Knicks overcame a 29-point deficit against the San Antonio Spurs in Game 4 to take a 3-1 lead in the NBA Finals. Here’s how it happened.

media:content.media:text: 2026 NBA Finals - San Antonio Spurs v New York Knicks
media:content.media:description: OG Anunoby #8 of the New York Knicks shoots the game winning shot during the game against the San Antonio Spurs during Game Four of the 2026 NBA Finals on Wednesday, at Madison Square Garden in New York.

media:content.media:text: 2026 NBA Finals - Game Four
media:content.media:description: OG Anunoby #8 of the New York Knicks shoots the game winning shot during the game against the San Antonio Spurs during Game Four of the 2026 NBA Finals on Wednesday, at Madison Square Garden in New York.

media:content.media:text: New York Knicks star Karl-Anthony Towns celebrates after his team's 107-106 victory against the San Antonio Spurs in Game 4 of the 2026 NBA Finals at Madison Square Garden.
media:content.media:description: OG Anunoby #8 of the New York Knicks shoots the game winning shot during the game against the San Antonio Spurs during Game Four of the 2026 NBA Finals on Wednesday, at Madison Square Garden in New York.

item.title: Knicks on brink of title after greatest-ever NBA Finals comeback. Here’s how they did it.

item.dc:creator: Alexander Smith
item.description: LONDON — The condemnation over anti-immigrant riots in Northern Ireland was being matched by another growing outrage in Britain on Thursday: that the world’s richest man was inciting the violence

media:content.media:text: TOPSHOT-BRITAIN-NIRELAND-POLICE-INVESTIGATION-IMMIGRATION
media:content.media:description: Fires burn around police vehicles as protesters (behind) stand off with police in Glengormley, north of Belfast, Northern Ireland, on June 10, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Britain-Northern-Ireland-Stabbing
media:content.media:description: Vehicles set on fire by protesters burn on Lendrick Street in Belfast, Northern Ireland, on Tuesday.

media:content.media:text: Tommy Robinson speaks at a flash protest outside Southampton
media:content.media:description: Tommy Robinson speaks at a protest outside Southampton Central Police Station in southern England on June 2.

media:content.media:text: TOPSHOT-BRITAIN-NIRELAND-POLICE-INVESTIGATION-IMMIGRATION
media:content.media:description: People stand next to burnt-out cars and homes after demonstrations turned violent the night before, in Belfast, on Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: Elon Musk attends the U.S.-Saudi Investment Forum in Washington on Nov. 19, 2025.
media:content.media:description: Elon Musk has been accused of inciting violence

item.title: Elon Musk under fire for stoking anti-immigrant riots in Belfast

item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
Rohan Nadkarni
Doha Madani
Andrew Greif
Greg Rosenstein
item.description: The World Cup, beginning Thursday afternoon, features the biggest names in global soccer, including two — Lionel Messi of Argentina and Cristiano Ronaldo — who are considered among the greatest to ever step on a field.

media:content.media:text: Lionel Messi wears a pink jersey on the soccer field
media:content.media:description: Lionel Messi of Inter Miami during a match against FC Cincinnati on May 13.

media:content.media:text: Cristiano Ronaldo.
media:content.media:description: Lionel Messi of Inter Miami during a match against FC Cincinnati on May 13.

media:content.media:text: Kylian Mbappe of Real Madrid on March 04, 2025 in Madrid, Spain.
media:content.media:description: Lionel Messi of Inter Miami during a match against FC Cincinnati on May 13.

media:content.media:text: Sadio Mané.
media:content.media:description: Lionel Messi of Inter Miami during a match against FC Cincinnati on May 13.

media:content.media:text: Son Heung-min.
media:content.media:description: Lionel Messi of Inter Miami during a match against FC Cincinnati on May 13.

media:content.media:text: Netherlands v Ecuador - International Friendly
media:content.media:description: Lionel Messi of Inter Miami during a match against FC Cincinnati on May 13.

media:content.media:text: Charles De Ketelaere, left, and Luka Modric run on the soccer field
media:content.media:description: Lionel Messi of Inter Miami during a match against FC Cincinnati on May 13.

media:content.media:text: Mo Salah, center, kicks the soccer ball while in between two players from the opposing team
media:content.media:description: Lionel Messi of Inter Miami during a match against FC Cincinnati on May 13.

item.title: Ageing but still hungry: The legendary World Cup stars to watch

item.dc:creator: Angela Yang
item.description: International tourists traveling through the U.S. ahead of FIFA’s festivities have been documenting their American experiences on social media.

media:content.media:text: Elsa Thora, a Swedish citizen visiting the United States during the World Cup.
media:content.media:description: Elsa Thora, a Swedish citizen, has gone viral on X for her posts about visiting the U.S. for the World Cup.

item.title: They came for the World Cup. They fell in love with Buc-ee’s and ranch dip.

item.dc:creator: Alexander Smith
Abigail Williams
item.description: Somalia isn’t competing at the World Cup, but from the scenes at Mogadishu’s airport, you’d think the country had won the trophy.

media:content.media:text: Somali international referee Omar Abdulkadir Artan waves to supporters while draped in the Somali flag as he is welcomed ahead of a solidarity football match after returning to Somalia in Mogadishu on June 10, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Somali international referee Omar Abdulkadir Artan waves to supporters while draped in the Somali flag as he is welcomed ahead of a solidarity football match after returning to Somalia in Mogadishu on June 10, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Aymen Hussein of Iraq reacts during a match against Bolivia on March 31, 2026 in Guadalupe, Mexico.
media:content.media:description: Aymen Hussein of Iraq reacts against Bolivia in Guadalupe, Mexico, on March 31.

item.title: Referee barred from entering U.S. for World Cup gets a hero’s welcome in Somalia

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
Rebecca Cohen
item.description: Unite Here Local 11, which represents nearly 2,000 cooks, dishwashers, bartenders and concession workers at SoFi Stadium, voted just last week to authorize a strike.

media:content.media:text: SoFi Stadium workers arrive at union headquarters
media:content.media:description: SoFi Stadium workers arrive at union headquarters in Inglewood, Calif., for a strike vote Thursday.

item.title: Workers at L.A.-area World Cup stadium reach tentative agreement after authorizing strike

item.dc:creator: Natasha Korecki
Sahil Kapur
item.description: In a time of war and rising prices, Democrats in Maine say another issue is motivating them in the Senate race: Brett Kavanaugh’s Supreme Court confirmation eight years ago.

media:content.media:text: Brett Kavanaugh
media:content.media:description: Sen. Susan Collins' vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court has already come up repeatedly in the Maine Senate race.

media:content.media:text: Susan Collins speaks while seated during a hearing
media:content.media:description: Sen. Susan Collins' vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court has already come up repeatedly in the Maine Senate race.

item.title: Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh takes on a starring role in Maine’s Senate race

item.description: A scanner, microscope and an old-fashioned teardown of Trump Mobile’s T1 phone showed that it was almost identical to the HTC U24 Pro. NBC News' Brian Cheung explains.

media:content.media:title: Inside Trump Mobile
media:content.media:description: A scanner, microscope and an old-fashioned teardown of Trump Mobile’s T1 phone showed that it was almost identical to the HTC U24 Pro. NBC News' Brian Cheung explains.

item.title: Inside Trump Mobile

item.description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

media:content.media:title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final
media:content.media:description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

item.title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final

item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
item.description: Minutes after the New York Knicks had won Game 4 of the NBA Finals, Taylor Swift led an impromptu pep rally in the bowels of Madison Square Garden, on her way out.

media:content.media:text: 2026 NBA Finals - Game Four
media:content.media:description: Victor Wembanyama looks on during the second half collapse against the New York Knicks in Game Four of the 2026 NBA Finals at Madison Square Garden on Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: 2026 NBA Finals - San Antonio Spurs v New York Knicks
media:content.media:description: Victor Wembanyama looks on during the second half collapse against the New York Knicks in Game Four of the 2026 NBA Finals at Madison Square Garden on Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: BASKET-NBA-FINALS-GAME 4-FANS
media:content.media:description: Victor Wembanyama looks on during the second half collapse against the New York Knicks in Game Four of the 2026 NBA Finals at Madison Square Garden on Wednesday.

item.title: Silence fills Spurs locker room after devastating Game 4 meltdown

item.dc:creator: Yuliya Talmazan
item.description: Taylor Swift and Timothée Chalamet were among the celebrities celebrating the New York Knicks’ crucial victory over the San Antonio Spurs in the NBA Finals.

media:content.media:text: 2026 NBA Finals - Game Four
media:content.media:description: (L to R) Ben Stiller, Este Haim, Taylor Swift, and Mariska Hargitay react during the fourth quarter in Game Four of the 2026 NBA Finals between the San Antonio Spurs and the New York Knicks at Madison Square Garden on June 10, 2026 in New York City.

media:content.media:text: 2026 NBA Finals - San Antonio Spurs v New York Knicks
media:content.media:description: Timothee Chalamet celebrates after Game Four of the 2026 NBA Finals on Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: Spike Lee, above, and John Starks, Iman Shumpert, Stephon Marbury, Ben Stiller and Ron Artest, below, celebrate.
media:content.media:description: Spike Lee, above, and John Starks, Iman Shumpert, Stephon Marbury, Ben Stiller and Ron Artest, below, celebrate.

item.title: Swift, Chalamet, U.S. soccer team join wild New York celebrations after epic Knicks win

item.description: Track the 2026 FIFA World Cup schedule, and find out how to watch the matches, what time to tune in, channels to follow, how you can stream the matches and more.

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 schedule guide: Where to watch, time, streaming and more

item.dc:creator: Berkeley Lovelace Jr.
item.description: UnitedHealthcare, CVS Health and Humana had the highest denial rates for long-term care requests, according to a report from the agency’s inspector general.

media:content.media:text: Unrecognisable elderly female patient in hospital bed with Pulse Oximeter on finger.

item.title: Medicare Advantage plans denied prior authorization requests at unusually high rates, HHS report finds

item.dc:creator: Ryan J. Reilly
item.description: The Trump administration has said the fund isn’t moving forward, but the president has said he’d like to pay purported victims “the kind of money that they deserve.”

media:content.media:text: Trump supporters storm Capitol building in Washington
media:content.media:description: The Trump administration has given mixed messages about the status of the recently created "anti-weaponization" fund.

item.title: Judge warns DOJ not to ‘play possum’ with ‘anti-weaponization’ fund it says is dead

item.dc:creator: Raquel Coronell Uribe
item.description: The president suggested the recent numbers mean there will be a bigger decline in inflation once the war in Iran is over.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Signs The Secure America Act
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump during a signing ceremony for the "Secure America Act" in the Oval Office of the White House on June 10, 2026.

item.title: Trump says ‘I love the inflation’ as annual rate jumps to a 3-year high

item.dc:creator: Tim Stelloh
Bill Feather
Andrew Blankstein
item.description: A San Diego man previously accused in a 2023 murder was charged Wednesday with killing three more people, officials said

media:content.media:text: The FBI, CHP and San Diego police investigated a home in Southcrest after human remains were found on Tuesday.
media:content.media:description: The FBI, the California Highway Patrol and San Diego police investigated a home in San Diego's Southcrest neighborhood after human remains were found Tuesday.

item.title: Slaying suspect in San Diego charged with 3 more murders, including 2 cold cases

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Here is everything you need to know about watching the 2026 FIFA World Cup, including TV channels, streaming options and when the World Cup actually takes place.

media:content.media:text: The 2026 World Cup will broadcast on Fox, with Spanish language matches airing on Telemundo.
media:content.media:description: The 2026 World Cup will broadcast on Fox, with Spanish language matches airing on Telemundo.

media:content.media:text: The 2026 World Cup will broadcast on Fox, with Spanish language matches airing on Telemundo.
media:content.media:description: The 2026 World Cup will broadcast on Fox, with Spanish language matches airing on Telemundo.

item.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup: How to watch it if you don’t have cable

item.dc:creator: Harry Rabinowitz
item.description: Shop the best early Amazon Prime Day tech deals on laptops, headphones, TVs and more, with editor-picked discounts on popular electronics and gadgets.

media:content.media:text: Amazon Prime Day starts June 23, but lots of popular tech products are already steeply discounted.
media:content.media:description: Amazon Prime Day starts June 23, but lots of popular tech products are already steeply discounted.

media:content.media:text: Amazon Prime Day starts June 23, but lots of popular tech products are already steeply discounted.
media:content.media:description: Amazon Prime Day starts June 23, but lots of popular tech products are already steeply discounted.

item.title: The 31+ best early Prime Day tech deals you don’t have to wait to shop

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: Target Circle Week, also called Target Circle Deal Days, is in a few weeks, but there are already deals available. These are the best deals in tech, kitchen, beauty and more.

media:content.media:text: Target Circle Deal Days takes place in June this year, the same week as Amazon Prime Day.
media:content.media:description: Target Circle Deal Days takes place in June this year, the same week as Amazon Prime Day.

media:content.media:text: Target Circle Deal Days takes place in June this year, the same week as Amazon Prime Day.
media:content.media:description: Target Circle Deal Days takes place in June this year, the same week as Amazon Prime Day.

item.title: 25+ early deals you can shop at Target before Circle Deal Days begins
